title: zerna riparia subsp. heterophylla
intro: Zerna riparia subsp. heterophylla, also known as bitter vetch or bitter vetch subsp., is a perennial legume plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a digestive aid, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Zerna riparia subsp. heterophylla include its potential to reduce symptoms of digestive disorders, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water.
